title: HTTP Request node execution failed due to bad data
symptom: The HTTP Request node fails with a 'Node Execution Failed' error when sending a malformed JSON payload.
not_this_if: Error is related to credentials or API rate limits
root_cause: The error occurs when the JSON payload sent to the API contains a typo or is otherwise malformed, causing the API to reject the request and the node to fail.
fix_steps: Check the execution log for the specific error message
Copy the input JSON and validate it using a JSON validator
Correct any errors found in the JSON payload
agent_instruction: Validate the JSON payload for errors and correct them before retrying the HTTP Request node.
